message:
fix(backup): derive created_at from timestamp when file metadata unavailable

Fallback to the timestamp from directory name when filesystem created_at
metadata is unavailable (e.g., on some mounted filesystems):

- Use created_ts from directory name parsing
- Convert to ISO8601 string via format_iso8601()
- Only use if timestamp is non-negative

Ensures list_backup_entries() works reliably across filesystem types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
